usageNote: Operational seed data for the Web/Admin event directory. This file is not consumed by the current content importer; records mirror AdminSaveOrganizerProfileRequest and AdminSaveConversationEventRequest shapes for later manual entry or a future event-directory import command.

sourceReferences.reviewNote: Public page states that the free Language Cafe is hosted in Berlin-Schoeneberg and takes place every second Wednesday from 17:00 to 20:00.
Hamburg Welcome Center page lists free German talk groups, including Dialog in Deutsch at public libraries and online groups.
University of Hamburg page lists German language cafes with weekly meetups during the lecture period.
Dialogcafe Munich page describes free weekly online and in-person German conversation meetings.
Munich public library page lists Sprachcafe Deutsch events for German learners.
BAMF page explains integration course content, language course topics, and orientation course topics.
Hilokal page describes free online German speaking practice and live audio rooms.

organizerProfiles.description: Privately organized Berlin language cafe for relaxed language practice with conversation tables and advance registration.
organizerProfiles.publicContactMethod: Use the registration form or source page.

organizerProfiles.description: Hamburg public-library German conversation groups guided by volunteer facilitators, with in-person and online groups.
organizerProfiles.publicContactMethod: Check the source page for current groups and online participation details.

organizerProfiles.description: University of Hamburg language cafe program with volunteer-led weekly language practice during the lecture period.
organizerProfiles.publicContactMethod: Use UHH Join and the source page for registration details.

organizerProfiles.description: Munich German conversation project with free weekly online and in-person meetings at several district culture centers.
organizerProfiles.publicContactMethod: Check the source page for current locations, online access, and questions.

organizerProfiles.description: Munich public library language cafe program with German conversation circles for learners.
organizerProfiles.publicContactMethod: Check the source page for current dates and branches.

organizerProfiles.description: Official German federal information about integration courses, language-course topics, orientation-course topics, and course procedure.
organizerProfiles.publicContactMethod: Use BAMF official website and regional office guidance.

organizerProfiles.description: Online platform for free German conversation practice with live audio rooms and learner communities.
organizerProfiles.publicContactMethod: Use the platform signup and current room listings.

conversationEvents.name: parlundo Language Cafe Berlin
conversationEvents.description: Free Berlin language cafe for relaxed language practice. Suitable for learners who want low-pressure conversation and meeting people while practicing German or other languages.
conversationEvents.scheduleText: Every second Wednesday of the month, 17:00-20:00; check source page before attending.

conversationEvents.name: Dialog in Deutsch - Hamburg Talk Groups
conversationEvents.description: Free German conversation groups at Hamburg public libraries, guided by volunteer facilitators. Online groups are also listed by the organizer.
conversationEvents.contactMethod: Check the Hamburg Welcome Center source page for current group links and online participation details.
conversationEvents.scheduleText: Many groups in many libraries every week; check current group list before attending.

conversationEvents.name: PIASTA Language Cafes - German
conversationEvents.description: University of Hamburg language cafes where learners can drop in, speak outside class, and join volunteer-led conversation tables during the lecture period.
conversationEvents.contactMethod: Register through UHH Join during the semester.
conversationEvents.scheduleText: Weekly during lecture period from the third week; dates are listed in UHH Join.

conversationEvents.name: Dialogcafe Muenchen
conversationEvents.description: Free weekly German conversation meetings for everyone who wants to speak German, learn new words, meet people, and get to know Munich.
conversationEvents.approximateLocation: Multiple district culture centers and online
conversationEvents.contactMethod: Check the source page for current locations, online access, and questions.
conversationEvents.scheduleText: Weekly online and in person; check source page for current locations and times.

conversationEvents.name: Muenchner Stadtbibliothek Sprachcafe Deutsch
conversationEvents.description: German conversation circles in Munich public library branches for learners who want to practice in an informal setting.
conversationEvents.contactMethod: Check the source page for current branch dates.
conversationEvents.scheduleText: Recurring branch events; check source page for current dates and times.

conversationEvents.name: Hilokal German Conversation Practice
conversationEvents.description: Online German conversation practice with live and scheduled audio tables, learner levels, and learner controls such as blocking and reporting.
conversationEvents.contactMethod: Use the platform signup and current room listings.
conversationEvents.scheduleText: Live and scheduled online audio tables; check platform for current sessions.

conversationEvents.name: BAMF Integration Course Information
conversationEvents.description: Official information resource for newcomers about German integration courses, language-course topics, orientation-course topics, and course procedure.
conversationEvents.contactMethod: Use BAMF official website and regional office guidance.
conversationEvents.scheduleText: Self-paced information resource; course schedules depend on local providers.
